title: Where the Roots Drink Rust
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A botanist investigating a sinkhole in the Louisiana bayou finds a subterranean root system that grows through abandoned machinery, pulsing with recorded human voices from every disaster in the parish since 1823.
long_description: A botanist investigating a sinkhole in the Louisiana bayou finds a subterranean root system that grows through abandoned machinery, pulsing with recorded human voices from every disaster in the parish since 1823.
